title: Integrated Rate Law Grapher
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive plots of [A], ln[A], and 1/[A] versus time that highlight the linear integrated rate law for zero, first, or second order reactions.

learningObjectives: Determine reaction order by identifying which integrated rate law plot is linear.
Calculate the rate constant k from the slope of the linear integrated rate law plot.

keyQuestions: Which plot is linear and what does that tell you about reaction order?
How does the slope of the linear plot relate to k?
commonMisconceptions: Multiple plots can be linear at once.
The slope is always positive regardless of order.
assessmentOpportunities: Students submit the slope and order screenshot for a given parameter set.
Learners explain how changing k affects each plot.
